hero.label: Barber · Varna · Bulgaria
hero.lead: Haircuts, beard styling and grooming for men and kids. Walk-in friendly when there's a slot — but online booking is faster.

services.title: What I do.
services.sub: Every appointment includes consult, wash, cut and styling. No upsells, no hidden add-ons.

items.name: Kid's Haircut (6–10 y.o.)
items.desc: Consultation, wash, precise haircut, blow-dry and styling. A calm and comfortable experience tailored to your child's age.

items.name: Men's Haircut
items.desc: Consultation, wash, precise cut and contouring, eyebrow shaping, nose and ear waxing, styling and home care tips. Suits both classic and modern looks.

items.name: Men's Long Hair Haircut
items.desc: Careful shaping and maintenance of long hair using professional techniques suited to your hair type. Includes consultation, wash, cut and styling.

items.name: Men's Haircut & Hair Camouflage
items.desc: Precise haircut combined with camouflaging grey or thinning hair using specialist techniques and products. Includes consultation, wash, cut, camouflage and styling.

items.name: Express Beard Refresh
items.desc: Quick beard trim, shaping and moisturizing for a clean, well-groomed look.

items.name: Royal Beard Shaping
items.desc: Premium beard shaping with attention to detail. Includes face patches, hot towels, eye mask and waxing.

items.name: Royal Shave
items.desc: Premium straight razor shave with warm towel preparation, moisturizing and a finishing massage for a smooth, comfortable result.

items.name: Beard Shaping & Camouflage
items.desc: Professional beard shaping with grey hair camouflage for a fresh, well-kept look. Includes consultation and care.

items.name: Express Complex
items.desc: Haircut and beard shaping combined — perfect for the busy man who wants a fresh, groomed look.

items.name: Bald Complex
items.desc: Professional beard shaping combined with a classic head shave. Includes skin care and high-quality products.

items.name: Royal Complex
items.desc: Full grooming package with precise haircut, beard shaping and additional services for a polished look. Includes consultation and professional products.

items.name: Haircut, Camouflage & Beard Shaping
items.desc: Complete package with haircut, grey hair camouflage and beard shaping. Includes consultation and professional products.

items.name: SPA Complex
items.desc: Luxury package with haircut, beard shaping, facial care and relaxing treatments for full comfort and style.

items.name: Facial Therapy
items.desc: Add-on. Professional facial care with hydrating and nourishing treatments.

items.name: Patches
items.desc: Included in: Haircut, Beard Shaping, Complex.

items.name: Ear & Nose Waxing
items.desc: Included in: Haircut, Beard Shaping, Complex. Add-on. Removal of unwanted hair from nose and ears for a clean, groomed look.

items.name: Eyebrow Shaping
items.desc: Included in: Haircut, Beard Shaping, Complex. Add-on. Precise eyebrow shaping for a neat, balanced look.

items.name: Head Camouflage
items.desc: Add-on. Concealing thinning hair and uneven areas for a natural, well-kept appearance.

items.name: Beard SPA & Face Care
items.desc: Add-on. Luxury nourishing and relaxing treatments for beard and facial skin.

items.name: Beard Camouflage
items.desc: Add-on. Concealing grey hairs and uneven patches for a fresh, well-groomed look.

work.title: See the change.
work.sub: Drag to compare. The cut speaks louder than the copy.
work.galleryTitle: Real cuts, real clients. No filters.

reviews.title: Reviews.
reviews.sub: Pulled straight from Altegio. Nothing edited.

items.text: Eliza is a wonderful specialist! She approaches everything with attention to detail and care. I'm very happy with the haircut and beard shaping tailored to my style. Highly recommend!
items.name: Emil

items.text: Excellent service! The hairdresser was very professional and did an amazing job. I'm extremely happy with the result and will definitely visit again! 🫶🏻
items.name: Georgi Zhelyazkov

items.text: A real professional who knows exactly how to cut a classic hairstyle. Highly recommended!
items.name: Nick

items.text: Polite service and true professionalism. Honestly, I have never seen such attention to detail anywhere before. Bravo and kudos. Eliza is very attentive, talented, and clearly loves her work! She exceeded my expectations.
items.name: Ali Aliev

items.text: Incredibly precise work — she perfects every detail, so attentive! One of a kind! We are very pleased, thank you!
items.name: Mariyana Madzharova

items.text: High quality service as always — the hairdresser is kind and attentive. 10/10
items.name: Dimitri

about.title: Meet your barber.
about.p1: I'm Eliza — a barber with three years behind the chair, now based in Varna. I trained across Ukraine — Zaporizhzhia, Dnipro, Kyiv — and continued here in Varna, picking up masterclasses from visiting masters along the way. Since 2025 I've been part of Zeus Barbershop.
about.p2: I cut for men and kids — and I treat every chair the same: ask the right questions, take time, do it once. No conveyor belt, no upselling, no rushing you out the door.
about.p3: Outside the studio you'll find me at the Sea Garden with a coffee, or at vocal school chasing a completely different kind of craft.

whyMe.title: One client at a time
whyMe.desc: No double-booking. The chair is yours.

whyMe.title: Sterile, every cut
whyMe.desc: Clean tools, every time. Single-use blades.

whyMe.title: Honest pricing
whyMe.desc: Fixed menu. No surprise add-ons at checkout.

cta.title: Ready for your new look?
cta.sub: Book online in two minutes. No phone call, no waiting list.

items.q: How much does a haircut cost in Varna?
items.a: Men's haircut starts at 20€. The full menu is on this page — prices are fixed, no surprise add-ons. The combo cut + beard is the best-value option at 25€.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Tap any "Book" button on this page — it opens the booking widget. Pick a service, pick a slot, you're done. Confirmation goes to your email and phone.

items.q: Where are you located and how to get there?
items.a: ul. Dimitar Ikonomov 36, Levski district, Varna. Five minutes walk from Yavor bus stop.
Yes — kids 6 and up. The kids cut is 15€. We keep it calm, no rush, no fuss. Tablets and snacks welcome.
Russian and Ukrainian fluently. Bulgarian and English — enough to make you feel at home.

items.q: How long does a haircut take?
items.a: Plan for 60 minutes for a haircut, 30 for a beard, 90 for the combo. I don't double-book so we don't run late.

items.q: Do I need to bring anything?
items.a: Just yourself. Towels, capes, products — all here. Reference photos welcome but optional.
Yes — beard sculpt, line-up, hot-towel and razor finish. Pair it with Beard SPA & Face Care (20€) for a full nourishing treatment.

meta.title: Barber in Varna — Eliza | Haircuts & Beard
meta.description: Professional barber in Varna. Haircuts, beard styling and grooming at Zeus Barbershop. Book online — no waiting. Haircut from 20€.
